questionHtml:
The cosmic microwave background (CMB) radiation is observed to have anisotropies.

State the nature of the anisotropies observed in the CMB radiation.
markschemeHtml: the temperature/«peak» wavelength/intensity «of the CMBR» varies «slightly» / is not constant in different directions ✓

meta.title: State the nature of the anisotropies observed in the CMB radiation.
